allow: Bash(npm install express better-sqlite3 nodemailer cors dotenv multer csv-parse)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Companies: {len\(d\)}, first: {d[0][""name""] if d else ""none""}''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Queue items: {len\(d\)}''\); [print\(f''  - {i[""first_name""]} {i[""last_name""]}, step {i[""current_step""]}, subject: {i[""step_subject""][:50]}''\) for i in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Server up, companies:'', d[''totalCompanies'']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; seqs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''ID:{s[""id""]} - {s[""name""]} \({len\(s[""steps""]\)} steps, {s[""enrollment_count""]} enrolled\)''\) for s in seqs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; seqs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''ID:{s[""id""]} - {s[""name""]}''\) for s in seqs]")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/crm.db''\); const contacts = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, name, title, company, email FROM contacts WHERE id IN \(3,4,5,6,84,93,94,141,142,123,96,83,58,59,60,86,87,120,90,61,64,65,66,122,40,41,111,7,8,9,114,131,72,73,132,133,134\)''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(contacts, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/crm.db''\); console.log\(db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM contacts LIMIT 1''\).all\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\(''data/crm.db''\); const contacts = db.prepare\(''SELECT c.id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.title, c.email, co.name as company FROM contacts c JOIN companies co ON c.company_id = co.id WHERE c.id IN \(3,4,5,6,84,93,94,141,142,123,96,83,58,59,60,86,87,120,90,61,64,65,66,122,40,41,111,7,8,9,114,131,72,73,132,133,134\) ORDER BY c.id''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(contacts, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; deploys=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d.get\(''''state''''\), d.get\(''''created_at''''\), d.get\(''''error_message'''',''''''''\)\) for d in deploys[:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); users=d.get\(''''users'''',{}\); [print\(k, v.get\(''''auth'''',{}\).get\(''''token'''',''''NO_TOKEN''''\)\) for k,v in users.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\(''''ssl_url''''\) or d.get\(''''url''''\) or d.get\(''''default_domain'''',''''NOT FOUND''''\)\)")
